from: tenant_member_isolation policy via subquery on tenant_members
reason: self-referential subquery causes Postgres infinite-recursion error in RLS; direct predicate satisfies the tenants/products subqueries without recursion

decision: Postgres puro no Docker + auth local (cookie httpOnly HMAC + bcrypt) + RLS via papel app_user e current_app_user()
reason: founder optou por rodar 100% local no Docker Desktop sem nuvem
